case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. PALACIOS, SANDRA V.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOS, SANDRA V. $4,700.19 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,780.19
